Home / Services / Flooring Repair Services

Flooring Repair Services

Expert repairs to restore the beauty and functionality of your existing floors.

Even the most durable flooring can experience damage over time. Nguyen Brothers Inc. offers comprehensive flooring repair services to address issues like scratches, dents, water damage, and loose tiles. We understand the importance of maintaining the integrity and appearance of your floors, and we're committed to providing prompt and reliable repair solutions. Our experienced technicians can assess the damage and recommend the most effective repair techniques to restore your floors to their original condition.

We handle repairs for all types of flooring, including vinyl, wood, tile, and laminate. Whether you have a small scratch on your hardwood floor or a water-damaged section of vinyl flooring, we have the expertise and tools to fix it right. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair.

We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs in the future. Our team can provide advice on proper cleaning techniques, moisture control, and furniture protection to extend the life of your floors. With Nguyen Brothers Inc., you can trust that your floors are in good hands.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assessment: Evaluate the damage and determine the best repair approach.
  2. 02 Step 2: Preparation: Prepare the area for repair, including cleaning and removing debris.
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair: Perform the necessary repairs using high-quality materials and techniques.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing: Blend the repaired area seamlessly with the surrounding flooring.

Benefits

  • Cost-Effective Solution
  • Restores Appearance
  • Extends Floor Life
  • Prevents Further Damage

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my floors need repair?

Signs of flooring damage include scratches, dents, water damage, loose tiles, and squeaking sounds. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to have your floors inspected by a professional.

Can you repair water-damaged wood floors?

Yes, we can repair water-damaged wood floors, but the extent of the damage will determine the repair options. In some cases, we may need to replace damaged planks.

How long does flooring repair take?

The duration of flooring repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. Minor repairs can often be completed in a few hours, while more extensive repairs may take a day or two.
